title: Pain And Pleasure.
content:
God suffers not His saints and servants dear
    To have continual pain or pleasure here;
    But look how night succeeds the day, so He
    Gives them by turns their grief and jollity.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Pain And Pleasure."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
